title: Exercise mode
body: You're in Exercise mode — work through a method book one exercise at a time. Switch back to Free mode here anytime.

title: Pick an exercise
body: This shows the current exercise. Click it to open the selector: switch sets, search, see recents, and jump to any exercise. (N / P step through them.)

title: Read along
body: The notation for the current exercise. The current note lights up in time with the click as you play.

title: Tempo
body: Set the tempo here or tap it out with T. Each set remembers the last tempo you used per exercise.

title: Reps & auto-advance
body: Hit the target reps and the app logs the session, then advances to the next exercise automatically.

title: Start with a count-in
body: Press to start. Between exercises a count-in gives you a moment to read the next one before it begins.
